description: This node provides information provided by HTC Vive Cosmos controllers.

fields.User: The user we are getting controller information from.
fields.Node: The controller side to get information from.
fields.IsActive: Is this controller actively being used right now.
fields.BatteryLevel: The battery level of this controller.
fields.Menu: Is the menu button pressed right now.
fields.ButtonBY: Is the Button BY pressed right now.
fields.ButtonAX: Is the Button AX pressed right now.
fields.GripClick: Is the controller's grip clicked down right now.
fields.Bumper: Is the controller's bumper pressed right now.
fields.Joystick: The position of this controller's joystick.
fields.JoystickTouch: Is the controller's joystick being touched right now.
fields.JoystickClick: Is the controller's joystick clicked down right now.
fields.Trigger: The amount of how far this controller's trigger is being pressed down currently.
fields.TriggerTouch: Is the controller's trigger being touched right now.
fields.TriggerClick: Is the controller's trigger being clicked down right now.
